questionHtml:
People who suffer from night blindness cannot see well at night because their retinal cells produce an abnormal form of a protein pigment. Which protein is this?

A. Fibrin

B. Myosin

C. Rhodopsin

D. Immunoglobulin

meta.title: People who suffer from night blindness cannot see well at night because their retinal cells produce an abnormal form of a protein pigment. Which protein is this? A. Fibrin B. Myosi
